propositions: Parallel agent sessions racing to land on FFO main force manual rebase-and-retry, burning CI re-runs and agent attention.
Phase 1 delivers a serial auto-lander that rebases the front Autosubmit change/chain to tip, awaits fresh Verified, and ancestor-atomic submits the exact tested SHA.
The agent contract is one project command returning one typed terminal outcome (merged | needs_rebase | ci_failed | review_failed) with the bot as sole source of truth.
No Gerrit-specific landing logic is added to src/rebar core; landing lives in project infra and may only import rebar for ticket ops.
Gate safety invariants are preserved: FFO backstop, strict Verified, requester-votable Autosubmit ACL, and re-verify on the tested SHA before submit, recorded in ADR-0042.
Cross-stack batching is rejected and deferred to bounded-speculation idea c3a9; the platform-agnostic provider-seam is deferred to idea 1701.
